segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I bought a traditional recipe book and started learning how to bake. That sounds great. How has it been going so far? Well, with mixed success. My chocolate cake turned out fabulous, but my cookies, well, let's say I'm not going to have anyone try them. I managed to eat a couple, but only because I have strong teeth. You'll do better next time. I hope so. In fact, I'm going to try again tonight. I'm headed to the store right now to get some extra flour and sugar.
